name: keys
title: Keys
description: The estate-agent theme: photo-first listing cards on clean white with agency-board green, each flying a corner status flag — For sale, Under offer, Sold — price first and biggest in tabular figures. The phone number rides the masthead and every property ends in an inquiry CTA, because listings exist to make the phone ring.

tokens.--font-body: all text — a plain system sans, nothing showy
tokens.--text-xs: status flags and small labels (uppercase, tracked)
tokens.--text-price: the price on a property page — the biggest thing on it
tokens.--tracking-caps: letter spacing of uppercase labels and flags
tokens.--color-bg: page background — clean white with a warm cast
tokens.--color-card: listing cards, panels, the inquiry box
tokens.--color-muted: secondary text: addresses, dates, spec rows
tokens.--color-accent: estate-board green — links, buttons, focus rings
tokens.--color-accent-ink: text placed on the accent color
tokens.--color-flag-sale: the For sale flag (constant across schemes — it sits on photos)
tokens.--color-photo-blank: the quiet placeholder shown when a listing has no photo
tokens.--color-tint: green-tinted panel fill behind the inquiry CTA
tokens.--radius: corner rounding of cards and photos
